title: townsendia minima
intro: Townsendia minima, also known as the dwarf Townsendia or little Townsendia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It is native to the western parts of North America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, colds, and skin conditions, due to its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Townsendia minima is typically used as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in capsules or tinctures to harness its health benefits.
